src/main/java/com/test/catalog/infrastru._comment: List[Uuid] query input binds to a multi-value @RequestParam List<String>, not a scalar String (which would capture only the first ?productIds= value).

src/main/java/com/test/catalog/applicati._comment: The Query record carries the list and validates it with @NotEmpty (List), not @NotBlank (String).
